unmapped.reason: Nafion and analog polymers are organic and have no crystalline MP entry. DFT of repeat-unit monomers is possible but out of scope for v0.1.
Functional polymer (quaternary ammonium PE backbone); same caveat as proton_exchange_membrane.
Polymer composite stacking PEM+AEM; same caveat as proton_exchange_membrane.
Composition varies (PTFE, PVDF, polypyrrole, etc.); no canonical MP structure. Revisit per-coating in v0.2 if specific polymers become MESS-Parameters entries.
Not a material; describes a structural region (typically Pt/C ink on GDL). Its components (e.g. platinum_cathode) are covered separately.
Surface modification process, not a material. Belongs to MESS-Parameters operational category; no DFT structure to fetch.

Composition varies (Al2O3, MgO, clay-based). Leaving unmapped in v0.1 to avoid misleading users who assume a single proxy covers all ceramic separators. Revisit in v0.2 if MESS-Parameters splits by composition.
